items.name: sglang
items.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.

items.name: kvcache-autotune
items.description: 🚀 Optimize your KVCache performance with automatic tuning for efficient resource management and improved speed in LLM applications.

items.name: infermesh
items.description: Hardware-agnostic LLM inference serving platform (Milestone 1). Pluggable compute backends behind one InferenceBackend interface; OpenAI + Anthropic gateway; multi-model LRU/pin/TTL pool. Protocol layer adapted from oMLX (Apache-2.0).

items.name: llm-paper-radar
items.description: Daily LLM inference optimization paper digest

items.name: vllm
items.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

items.name: Rapid-MLX
items.description: The fastest local AI engine for Apple Silicon. 4.2x faster than Ollama, 0.08s cached TTFT, 100% tool calling. 17 tool parsers, prompt cache, reasoning separation, cloud routing. Drop-in OpenAI replacement. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider.

items.name: NanoBanana-PPT-Skills
items.description: 🎨 Generate high-quality PPTs with AI, featuring smart transitions and interactive playback for seamless presentations and engaging visuals.

items.name: VLN-YuanNav
items.description: 🧭 Enhance navigation with VLN-YuanNav, a visual-language model using advanced memory and decision-making for effective exploration.

items.name: RESTORE
items.description: An official implementation of "Improving Visual Token Reduction via Rectifying Distortions for Efficient Multimodal LLM Inference" (ICML 2026) in PyTorch.
